findings.search_query: Lenentine Monticello Aroostook County Maine deed registry land; "Wilmot Lenentine" Monticello farm
findings.source_title: Maine, Aroostook County Deed Books (FamilySearch Catalog) / Aroostook County Registry of Deeds (Southern District, Houlton)
findings.snippet: Online land records for Monticello include Deeds from 1808-1879 with an index 1839-1866; FamilySearch Aroostook County Deed Books collection covers Southern District (Houlton) 1865-1900. 'This collection does not have a searchable index. Only images are available.'
findings.claimed_facts: NO DEED VERIFIED. The Lenentine family is independently confirmed as a long-standing Monticello/Bridgewater, Aroostook Co. farming family (multiple Lenentine obituaries describe generations farming around Monticello), making a Monticello-area deed for Wilmot R. Lenentine highly plausible. Relevant register: Aroostook Southern District (Houlton). No book/page could be retrieved.
findings.notes: LEAD ONLY, not a verified deed. Aroostook deed books on FamilySearch are browse-only IMAGES with no name index and require login -- not reachable by this agent. The Aroostook Southern District registry search portal (aroostook.me.us / maineregistryofdeeds.com) requires an interactive account session. Human action: create the free Aroostook Southern registry account or FamilySearch login and browse Monticello deed volumes ~1880-1933 for grantor/grantee 'Lenentine'.
